behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names the test (ok::ok::inline_link_whitespace_md), snapshot path, and describes expected R_PAREN token ranges.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes the bug symptom but doesn't specify which function/line to change.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests check that all R_PAREN tokens have text ')' (behavioral property), allowing alternative fixes.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests run cargo test/check/clippy and inspect snapshot output behaviorally.

test_not_tautological.reason: Tests require the parser to actually produce correct R_PAREN tokens matching the snapshot.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Tests verify snapshot update, test pass, compilation, formatting, clippy — all items mentioned in instruction.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests have descriptive names and docstrings explaining purpose.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction points to 'markdown inline link parser' which is appropriate domain-level pointing without naming specific lines.
